report_format.name: Suricatoos Premium PDF
report_format.summary: Premium branded Portable Document Format report. Version 20260701.
report_format.description: A premium, corporate vulnerability assessment report in Portable Document Format (PDF): branded cover, executive risk summary with a severity dashboard, a findings summary table, and detailed findings grouped by vulnerability (each with CVSS, CVEs, affected systems and remediation). Version 20260701.
